overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked downtown Los Santos (GTA V), following a character as they cross a wet street, pass through the US Bank building's ground floor, and continue along the sidewalk. The scene features reflective wet pavement, neon-lit skyscrapers with purple and blue lighting, and modern urban architecture.

second pedestrian enters from right and crosses alongside ego

tall palm trees lining the street median

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet downtown crosswalk at night, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the distance. A character in a red jacket enters from the left and begins crossing the street, followed by another pedestrian from the right. The camera follows from behind as they traverse the reflective crosswalk surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching bank entrance with escalator and stairs

events.description: reaches the opposite sidewalk and approaches the US Bank building entrance
begins ascending the escalator stairs toward the building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering the US Bank building, ascending the entrance stairs while following the lead pedestrian

entered.detail: large modern building with stone facade and prominent blue signage
illuminated blue sign with white text reading 'us bank' mounted above entrance
escalator and stair structure leading up to the building's ground floor entrance
tall street light pole with illuminated fixture

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the sidewalk and approaches the US Bank building, which features a prominent blue illuminated sign. The camera follows as they begin ascending the entrance escalator stairs, moving from the open street into the building's covered entrance area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered building passage with escalator and columns

events.description: enters the covered passage under the US Bank building, shielded from the rain
exits the covered passage back to the open sidewalk on the opposite side

agents.ego_description: ascending the escalator through the covered building passage, then exiting to the other side of the block

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with recessed lighting fixtures covering the entrance area
large cylindrical support column with tiled surface and dark base
large cylindrical support column with tiled surface and yellow signage

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the covered ground-floor passage of the US Bank building, passing between large support columns and under artificial lighting. The space is sheltered from the weather, featuring tiled floors and glass walls, before exiting back to the open sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with street trees and benches

events.description: exits the building passage and returns to the open sidewalk on West Olympic Blvd

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk past benches and trees, with illuminated city buildings visible ahead

entered.detail: wet concrete sidewalk with reflective surface and street name marker
tree with green foliage planted in circular grate
metal park bench on the sidewalk
large illuminated advertisement on distant building showing 'BLUE' text

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the building, the character emerges onto the sidewalk along West Olympic Blvd. The camera follows past street trees and benches, with the US Bank building now receding behind and new glass towers and digital billboards visible ahead in the misty night air.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked city intersection through the sheltered interior of a corporate building and back out into the misty urban night. It begins on a wet downtown crosswalk, following a character in a red jacket as they traverse the reflective pavement beneath the glow of distant neon skyscrapers. As the character reaches the sidewalk, the camera tracks them upward onto the entrance escalators of the US Bank building, shifting from the open street into a covered architectural space. The scene then moves through the building's ground-floor passage, gliding past large support columns and glass walls under artificial light before emerging once again onto the open sidewalk of West Olympic Blvd. Finally, the camera continues forward past street trees and benches, leaving the bank building behind as new glass towers and digital billboards appear through the night mist.
